summary: Beat the incumbent on modern note quality, KLAS validation, and clinician trust — not on size.

objections.objection: We're already standardized on Microsoft / Nuance.
objections.response: Standardizing on a platform shouldn't mean settling on note quality. Abridge is the #1 KLAS-rated ambient AI and integrates into the same Epic workflow. Run a head-to-head pilot and let clinician satisfaction and note quality decide.

objections.objection: DAX is the safe, established choice.
objections.response: Established isn't the same as best. The legacy DAX architecture predates modern LLMs; clinicians increasingly cite note-quality and edit-burden issues. Abridge was built LLM-native and has the independent KLAS ranking to back it up.

landmines: Ask what their current clinician satisfaction and note-edit rates actually are.
Ask whether their ambient note quality has independent, third-party KLAS validation.
Ask how quickly new specialty improvements ship on a legacy architecture.
proofPoints: LLM-native platform purpose-built for clinical conversations
Deep Epic integration with auditable, trusted notes

summary: Win on focus, trust, and proven note quality vs. a broad 'do-everything' platform story.

whereTheyWin: Rapid feature velocity and modern messaging

objections.objection: Ambience does coding and referrals too — it's a whole platform.
objections.response: Breadth is only valuable if the core works flawlessly. Documentation is where clinicians live every day — Abridge is #1 KLAS-rated on exactly that, at enterprise scale. Nail the core first; we integrate into the workflows around it.
Cutting-edge has to be clinically trustworthy. Abridge is LLM-native and independently validated — innovation our clinicians can actually rely on in front of patients.

landmines: Ask for independent, third-party validation of note quality at enterprise scale.
Probe how well the platform's breadth holds up under specialty depth.
Ask about support footprint and references at systems their size.
proofPoints: Enterprise-scale deployments with trusted note quality
Focused depth in the documentation workflow clinicians use most
